_comment: Local model context for mood_ck/. Reads full model settings from model-map.json at project root.

models_in_use.local_flow: mood_check.py reads text from stdin or --file -> splits into chunks (default 250 words, 30-word overlap) -> passes each chunk to EMIEngine.analyze() -> aggregates scores by match_rate weight -> prints dominant mood, top patterns, valence, arousal, and full JSON if --json. No network call, no API key required.
models_in_use.fallback: if EMIEngine import fails a clear error is printed to stderr with the expected symlink path. chunk analysis errors are logged per chunk and the remaining chunks continue.
models_in_use.notes: emi_model/ is a symlink to /Users/mac/Documents/deploy_emi_model. Engine has 512-channel BCI architecture and a 370K-word lexicon (lexicon.json).
